arts.ttl: Tottenham hold loan talks with striker who almost won France the World Cup - but face competition from Italian giants
arts.sum: The Frenchman joined PSG from Eintracht Frankfurt in 2023 for £79million having scored 26 goals and assisted 17 in 50 matches. But he has struggled to kick on fo r the Ligue 1 champions.

arts.ttl: “Arsenal are definitely looking” – Sky Sports man drops exciting late night Arsenal update
arts.sum: Sky Sports reporter Dharmesh Sheth has delivered an update on Arsenal’s January transfer plans as the Gunners grapple with a growing injury crisis in their attacking lineup. Arsenal’s need to bolster their attack has become increasingly urgent after injuries to key players Bukayo Saka and Gabriel Jesus. arts.ttl: The stats that show Arsenal's growing reliance on set pieces and the concerning trend that highlights why Mikel Arteta MUST sign a new striker
arts.sum: If ever there was a game that showed Arsenal are in desperate need of a proven striker, then Sunday's FA Cup defeat against 10-men Manchester United was the perfect example.

arts.ttl: Tamworth star shares racist abuse sent to him after FA Cup loss to Tottenham
arts.sum: A Staffordshire Police spokesperson said: "We're aware of a social media message involving racist abuse that was sent online to a player following the FA Cup match between Tamworth and Tottenham Hotspur yesterday (Sunday 12 January). Tamworth player Chris Wreh has shared a screenshot of racist abuse he claims to have received after his team's FA Cup defeat to Tottenham Hotspur on Sunday, January 12.

arts.ttl: Bayindir shines as 10-man Man Utd beat Arsenal in Cup thriller
arts.sum: Manchester United goalkeeper Altay Bayindir shines as a 10-man Manchester United beat Arsenal on penalties in an FA Cup thriller at Emirates Stadium.

arts.ttl: Man Utd knock out Arsenal with 'five perfect penalties'
arts.sum: Watch the full penalty shootout as Manchester United score "five perfect penalties" to knock out Arsenal of the FA Cup and progress to the fourth round.

arts.ttl: Arsenal told to go in big for ‘excellent’ Premier League star with 63 goals & 45 assists
arts.sum: Arsenal have been urged to make a move for Brentford striker Bryan Mbeumo who would “be an excellent fit”. The Gunners are currently undergoing an injury crisis in attack with Bukayo Saka out injured with a long-term injury and an in-form Gabriel Jesus also being ruled out with a serious injury that could see him […] The post Arsenal told to go in big for ‘excellent’ Premier League star with 63 goals & 45 assists appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Report: £84m player Tottenham want to replace Heung-Min Son has decided he'd like to join Chelsea
arts.sum: It wouldn’t be a January transfer window without some of the big hitters in England like Chelsea and Tottenham being linked with the same player...

arts.ttl: Harry Maguire's X-rated rant at Kai Havertz after FA Cup controversy caught on camera
arts.sum: Harry Maguire has admitted VAR may now be a necessity in modern football after he was left incensed to be on the wrong end of a controversial penalty call in Manchester United's victory over Arsenal on Sunday . Referee Andy Madley pointed to the spot midway through the second half after Kai Havertz went to ground, only for replays of the incident to suggest the Arsenal forward went down under very easily.

arts.ttl: Arsenal Transfer News Today: Vlahovic OFFER, Zinchenko BATTLE, Jesus REPLACEMENT
arts.sum: Arsenal Transfer News Today: Vlahovic OFFER, Zinchenko BATTLE, Jesus REPLACEMENT In recent days, Spanish media has linked Arsenal with a move for Barcelona centre-back Ronald Araujo, who is the subject of intense interest from Juventus.
